name: California Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and butter together in a double boiler over hot water.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat the eggs, sugar, salt, and vanilla until well combined.
3. Gradually add the melted chocolate mixture to the egg mixture, stirring until fully blended.
4. Add the flour gradually while continuing to mix on low speed.
5. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
6. Pour the batter evenly into two greased 18- x 12-inch baking pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes, taking care not to overbake.
8. Allow the brownies to cool slightly before cutting into squares.
